evidence: No standalone dense table with 0x00EC/0x00ED/0x00F5/0x00F8/0x00F9 surfaced in extracted carriers.
Compact refs form a small scene-local band and map cleanly to owner/companion/list/variant objects rather than payload offsets.
Compact ids do not correspond to member start offsets or simple arithmetic on local blob starts.
Refs are compact numeric values with no direct Frontend/... strings at slot positions.
Left Path uses extended form 1aec0104, unlike u16 band used by Up/Right/Down.
